free_text: Target dependence of charge distributions in
spallation reactions of medium-mass nuclei with 12 GeV
Used for calibration of the beam intensity monitoring
Performed during 3 months starting about a few
hours after the end of irradiation
Uncertainty in detection efficiency of gamma
rays and statistical errors for photopeak
By authors: Detection of nuclides with lifetimes
shorter than about one hour are precluded.
